calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: ARC-057 SD-024xSD-025 interaction spike -- continuous CEM score-margin re-op (supersedes 768)
items.note: Re-operationalizes the V3-EXQ-768 vacuous_pass (measurement_degeneracy; failure_autopsy_767-768-cluster_2026-07-16 confirmed, applied governance 2026-07-16d REE_assembly e40362ebb7). 768's absolute gate C2 (binary pref_both_on) saturated to 1.0 with zero cross-seed variance; the interaction contrast C1 survived. Replaces the binary readout with the continuous CEM score-margin (identical fix to 767a); C1-C4 all ride the margin; single-drive arms produce ~0 margin so interaction margin = both-ON margin. criteria_non_degenerate guards both_on_margin_varies + interaction_margin_varies so it cannot re-flag vacuous. Smoke PASS (2 seeds): m11 17.0/14.7 (VARIES), m00/m10 0.0, m01 ~0, interaction persists under weight-zeroing, readiness met. GOV-REUSE-1: decisive readout = the continuous margin, NOT recorded in 768's manifest -> run. diagnostic -> on PASS route /failure-autopsy before governance; a clean PASS is the load-bearing evidence for ARC-057's DA x curiosity interaction. ARC-057 stays candidate (also v3_pending).
items.machine_affinity_note: cloud-class (linux-x86_64-py3.10) mint -- any of ree-cloud-2/3/4 is class-equivalent; pinned to ree-cloud-4 (affinity takes a single hostname) to guarantee a reusable cloud-class both_off-baseline fingerprint (Mac class would be unreusable by cloud consumers).
